issues.description: Missing condition: 'If your opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you' — should be a comparison condition (not present in DSL spec, but core to effect logic). Current 'Always' is incorrect.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) look at 5 cards (limit), (2) filter for {Heart Pirates} type, (3) reveal up to 1 card, (4) place rest at bottom of deck in any order. Current filter is 'Any' instead of type-based.
Action sequence incomplete. Effect requires: SearchDeck (with reveal + filter), then placement of remaining cards. Only single SearchDeck present; no secondary placement action.
